prompt: Minimalist commercial ad featuring an oversized Coca Cola can, ultra clean design. A young woman in an all white outfit leans casually against the giant can in a relaxed confident pose, eyes closed, holding a glass bottle of Coca Cola. Soft gradient red background with large bold white "Coca Cola" text behind. Glossy reflective floor, soft studio lighting, modern high end fashion and product photography. Small top right text "Designed by Mr Das". Bottom center tagline in small white font: "Open happiness."
promptEn: Minimalist commercial ad featuring an oversized Coca Cola can, ultra clean design. A young woman in an all white outfit leans casually against the giant can in a relaxed confident pose, eyes closed, holding a glass bottle of Coca Cola. Soft gradient red background with large bold white "Coca Cola" text behind. Glossy reflective floor, soft studio lighting, modern high end fashion and product photography. Small top right text "Designed by Mr Das". Bottom center tagline in small white font: "Open happiness."
promptZh: 极简主义商业广告，包含一个 超大号 Coca Cola 易拉罐，设计极其简洁。一位 身着全白套装的年轻女性 以自信放松的姿态斜靠在巨大的易拉罐旁，闭着双眼，手中拿着一瓶玻璃瓶装的 Coca Cola。柔和的红色渐变背景，背后有醒目的白色大号 "Coca Cola" 字样。光亮的反射地面，柔和的摄影棚灯光，现代高端时尚与产品摄影风格。右上角有小字 "Designed by Mr Das"。底部中心有白色小号标语："Open happiness."
